mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO mf_remind_log ( event_id, family_id, user_id, trigger_year, event_date, remind_date, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{log.eventId}, #{log.familyId}, #{log.userId}, #{log.triggerYear}, #{log.eventDate}, #{log.remindDate}, #{log.status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, family_id, user_id, trigger_year, event_date, remind_date, status, action_time, create_time, update_time FROM mf_remind_log WHERE event_date < #{beforeDate} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'READ')

SELECT rl.id AS remind_log_id, rl.event_id AS event_id, e.title AS title, e.category AS category, rl.status AS status, rl.event_date AS event_date, rl.remind_date AS remind_date, e.remind_advance_days AS remind_advance_days FROM mf_remind_log rl INNER JOIN mf_event e ON e.id = rl.event_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE rl.user_id = #{userId} AND rl.family_id = #{familyId} AND rl.status IN ('PENDING', 'READ') ORDER BY rl.event_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE mf_remind_log SET status = 'DONE', action_time = #{actionTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'READ')
UPDATE mf_remind_log SET status = 'CLOSED_BY_USER', action_time = #{actionTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'READ')
mapper.select: SELECT id AS remind_log_id, trigger_year AS trigger_year, event_date AS event_date, status AS status, action_time AS action_time FROM mf_remind_log WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY trigger_year DESC
SELECT id, event_id, family_id, user_id, trigger_year, event_date, remind_date, status, action_time, create_time, update_time FROM mf_remind_log WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
